name: Sky Fighter Pro
description: The Sky Fighter Pro is our flagship fighter kite engineered for aggressive cuts and stable high-wind flight. Hand-tuned spars and premium ripstop deliver tournament-level performance for serious pilots.
shortDescription: High flying fighter kite with premium ripstop sail.

name: Crimson Striker
description: A bold red fighter kite with responsive handling and reinforced leading edges. Ideal for intermediate pilots stepping into competitive flying.
shortDescription: Responsive fighter kite for intermediate pilots.

name: Goldcrest Elite
description: Luxury gold-trimmed premium kite with hand-painted details and a velvet storage sleeve. A centerpiece for collectors and display flying.
shortDescription: Luxury collector kite with hand-painted details.

name: Rainbow Festival Delta
description: A vibrant delta kite that soars effortlessly in light winds. Perfect for picnics, beach days, and festival weekends with the whole family.
shortDescription: Colorful delta kite for light-wind fun.

name: Apex Competition X
description: Tournament-tuned competition kite with precision balance and minimal drag. Used by regional champions for precision and endurance events.

name: Little Cloud
description: A cheerful single-line kite sized for kids ages 5+. Easy assembly, soft edges, and bright colors make first flights stress-free.
shortDescription: Easy first kite for young pilots.

name: Tokyo Rokkaku
description: Traditional Japanese rokkaku design with modern reinforcement. Stable in moderate winds and stunning in the sky.

name: Brazilian Flow Box
description: Inspired by Brazilian box-kite traditions, this design offers a unique silhouette and steady lift in coastal breezes.
